title: Present Continuous
topics: am/is/are + -ing · uses · vs. present simple · stative verbs
description: Přítomný čas průběhový — co se děje právě teď nebo dočasně.

vocabulary.cz: We are meeting at 6 pm tomorrow.
He is always losing his keys!

notes: \n📚 STATIVE VERBS — NOT used in continuous:
✓ I know the answer.  (NE: I am knowing)
✓ She loves coffee.  (NE: She is loving)
✓ Do you understand?  (NE: Are you understanding?)

quiz.sentence: She usually ___ (drink) tea, but today she ___ (drink) coffee.
Look! The children ___ (play) in the garden.
He ___ (work) late this week because of a deadline.

tasks: 1. Look around you right now and write 5 sentences about what
2. Write 3 sentence pairs showing the contrast between
3. Find 5 stative verbs not listed above and explain why they
